roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:BIFUR PRELIM, HEARD IN DEPT 306 BEFORE JUDGE DEKREON/CAL:PRELIMINARYHEARING/WIT SWORN:INSPECTOR JIMMIE LEW/X:OFFICER GREGORY PAK IS RECALLEDTO TESTIFY FOR THE PEOPLE,/X:BOTH DEFENSE COUNSELS STIPULATE TO THE 16 BOXES BROUGHT IN TO BE  SHOWN TO THE COURT,/X:STIPULATION 1 - THE 16 BOXES BROUGHT IN COURT CONTAINS SUSPECTED NARCOTICS WERE SEIZED AT THE ADDRESS 1381AND 1383 19TH AVENUE, SF,/X:STIPULATION 2 - SFPD CRIMINALIST NATASHA SMITH, IF CALLED WOULD TESTIFY THAT SHE PERSONALLY TESTED THE NARCOTICS IN THEBOXES, TESTED POSITIVE, USING THE STANDARD STEPS FOR TESTING, RESULTS ARE VALID AND EXCEPTIONAL; TAGGED AS #257074 AND #257074-SUPPLEMENTAL; WITH POLICE REPORT #090372778 (SEE SEPARATE LIST OF BOXES WITH RESPECTIVE WEIGHTS CONTENT OF SUSPECTED MARIJUANA),/HTA1:1, 2, 3 AND 4/BAIL:45,000/ /X:DEFENDANT REMAINS IN SURETY BOND STATUS,/TWA/
